prompt: A realistic close-up video of a single raindrop hitting a shallow puddle, causing a crown splash to rise and circular ripples to expand outward across the water.
notes: Crown/ripples visible, but sampled frames do not show a clean falling raindrop before the footprint.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a small pebble dropping into a still pond, causing circular ripples to spread outward across the water.
notes: Pebble and outward ripples are visible; causal relation is usable.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a tiny hailstone landing on calm water, causing concentric rings to spread across the surface after impact.
notes: Hailstone and rings are visible, but rings appear before the target in sampled frames.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a blue ink droplet falling into a clear glass of water, causing a blue plume to bloom and spread downward through the water.
expected_effect: colored plume spreads through clear water
notes: Blue plume is clear, but the droplet is not well separated from the footprint.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a shoe stepping into smooth wet beach sand, causing a clear footprint to remain after the step.
notes: Footprint-like trace is visible, but no shoe/stepping cause is visible.

prompt: A realistic low-angle video of a bicycle tire rolling through soft mud, causing a clear tire track to remain behind it.
notes: Tire and tracks are visible, but tracks appear pre-existing before the tire enters.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a hand pressing into a slab of soft clay, causing a clear handprint to remain after the hand lifts away.
notes: Nearly blank clay-colored video; no hand or handprint.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a black marker drawing a curved line on a clean whiteboard, causing the black line to remain on the board.
notes: Nearly blank whiteboard; no marker or line.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a paintbrush dragging across a blank canvas, causing a blue paint stroke to remain on the canvas.
expected_effect: colored paint stroke remains on canvas
notes: Paint stroke appears late, but no paintbrush/cause is visible.

prompt: A realistic side-view video of a baseball striking a clean glass window, causing branching cracks to spread across the glass.
notes: Glass cracks are visible, but no baseball impact/cause is visible.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a hammer striking a white ceramic tile, causing a dark crack to spread across the tile.
notes: Nearly blank tile video; no hammer or crack.

prompt: A realistic front-view video of a small rock hitting a clean car windshield, causing a spiderweb crack to appear and spread outward.
notes: Rock appears before spiderweb cracks; usable causal chain.

prompt: A realistic slow-motion video of a ceramic cup falling onto a hard floor, causing broken ceramic pieces to scatter outward.
expected_effect: broken ceramic pieces scatter on floor

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a soccer ball hitting a goal net, causing the net to stretch and ripple backward.
notes: Soccer ball hits the net and visible net deformation/ripple follows.

prompt: A realistic slow-motion close-up video of a tennis ball hitting a racket, causing the racket strings to bend inward.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a bowling ball landing on a soft mattress, causing the mattress surface to dent downward.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a finger pressing down on a thin rubber sheet, causing the sheet to stretch downward.
notes: Nearly blank grey video; no finger or rubber-sheet deformation.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a magnet sliding near scattered iron filings, causing the filings to form curved field lines.
expected_effect: iron filings form curved field lines
notes: Iron filings are visible and magnet is partly visible/cropped; causal ordering is weak.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a plastic comb moving near tiny paper scraps, causing the scraps to lift and cling together in a cluster.
expected_effect: paper scraps lift and cling together
notes: Comb and paper scraps are visible; lift/clustering cue is usable.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a small electric fan blowing toward hanging paper strips, causing the strips to flutter and bend away.
expected_effect: paper strips flutter and bend away
notes: Paper strips are visible, but no fan/cause is visible and motion is hard to judge.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a finger pushing the first domino in a row, causing the dominoes to topple one after another.
notes: Domino row is static; no finger and no toppling cascade.

prompt: A realistic living-room video of a remote control pointing at a television, causing the television screen to turn on and glow.
notes: TV turns on, but the remote control/cause is not visible.

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a light switch being flipped on, causing a desk lamp to turn on and illuminate the table.
expected_effect: lamp turns on and illuminates table

prompt: A realistic close-up video of a key turning in a door lock, causing the door to swing open.
